source.description: A reviewed six-panel pencil process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent three-quarter pocket-watch drawing on warm paper.

process_strategy: The sheet builds one round watch from light circles through the case, crown, dial, hands, chain, color, and a final graphite cleanup.

final_elements.name: round watch case and construction circles
final_elements.description: A centered round pocket-watch body with a faint inner dial guide.

final_elements.name: crown and bow loop
final_elements.description: A small top crown with a rounded hanging loop.

final_elements.name: dial ring and hour marks
final_elements.description: An inset circular dial with simple readable marks.

final_elements.name: hands and chain
final_elements.description: Two hands and a loose short chain curling to one side.

final_elements.name: warm brass tint and ground shadow
final_elements.description: Restrained ochre tint on the established case and a pale shadow.

frames.visible_job: Sets the outer case circle and inner dial guide.
introduces: round watch case and construction circles

frames.visible_job: Adds the crown and bow loop at the established top edge.
requires_prior_elements: round watch case and construction circles

frames.visible_job: Adds the inner dial ring and simple hour marks.
requires_prior_elements: round watch case and construction circles

frames.visible_job: Adds hands inside the existing dial and the chain beside the case.
requires_prior_elements: round watch case and construction circles

frames.visible_job: Adds restrained brass tint and a soft shadow to established forms.
introduces: warm brass tint and ground shadow
requires_prior_elements: round watch case and construction circles

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens existing case, crown, dial, hands, chain, tint, and shadow.

rejection_checks: No crown, dial mark, hand, chain, tint, or shadow may first appear in the final image.
The watch must retain one scale, angle, and chain placement across all frames.
No late panel may replace the loose graphite construction with a different or overly polished watch design.
